case_title: TX COLLECT, INC. VS. JOSE I. ITURRALDE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TX COLLECT, INC. SERVED MAY-08-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ITURRALDE, JOSE I.
